description: 누적 지식그래프 — 모든 트리플을 포함하는 전체 그래프

edges.subject: ent-224
edges.reason: WPR Day 60 reached → Democrats demand accountability → Hegseth hearing. WPR deadline is the proximate cause of first congressional oversight.

edges.subject: ent-226
edges.reason: Trump 'blockade until nuclear deal' → Iran 'practical action' threat. Direct causal sequence within same news cycle.

edges.subject: ent-225
edges.reason: Iran war → energy price surge → FOMC cites elevated inflation from global energy → 8-4 split on easing bias. War indirectly caused Fed's most divided decision in 34 years.

edges.subject: ent-223
edges.reason: IDF chief's 'no ceasefire' contradicts Lebanon 3-week ceasefire extension. Military reality opposes diplomatic framework.

edges.subject: ent-227
edges.reason: Day 10 (14 killed) → Day 13 (8 killed, 3 rescue workers) = escalation chain. Double-tap tactics increasingly targeting emergency responders.

triples.subject: ent-260
triples.note: Project Freedom (US escort) directly challenges IRGC control of Hormuz — military confrontation implicit

triples.subject: ent-262
triples.note: Iran Hormuz Navigation Law and Project Freedom are competing legal/military frameworks for same waterway

triples.subject: ent-265
triples.note: Trump rejection follows Iran 14-point proposal — event chain from May 2 submission to May 3 rejection

triples.subject: ent-266
triples.note: Iran reviewing US response follows Trump rejection — negotiation cycle continues despite public rejection

triples.subject: ent-267
triples.note: Haykal-Clearfield meeting is continuation of Israel-Lebanon ceasefire monitoring from Apr 16 ceasefire

triples.subject: ent-269
triples.note: Fujairah attack on same day as Project Freedom launch — Iran retaliating against UAE for facilitating US operations

triples.subject: ent-270
triples.note: IRGC maritime control zone (May 4) implements what Iran parliament navigation law (May 3) proposed legislatively

triples.subject: ent-268
triples.note: US-Iran fire exchange directly resulted from competing control claims over same waterway

triples.subject: ent-275
triples.note: UAE air defenses intercepted Iranian missiles on same day US fought IRGC in Hormuz — implicit US-UAE alignment

triples.subject: ent-271
triples.note: Berri rejection of negotiations effectively undermines the ceasefire diplomatic framework

triples.subject: ent-278
triples.reasoning: Project Freedom(ent-260) 시행이 UAE 보복 공격(ent-278) 촉발 — 5/4 푸자이라에 이어 5/5 제벨알리

triples.subject: ent-279
triples.reasoning: Strait Authority(ent-279)는 이란 항행법(ent-265)의 집행 메커니즘 — 입법→통제구역→집행기관 3단계 완성

triples.subject: ent-286
triples.reasoning: 중국(ent-286)과 러시아(ent-009) 모두 이란의 UNSC 지지를 요청받은 안보리 거부권 국가 — 공동 이란 지원 가능성

triples.subject: ent-275
triples.reasoning: UAE(ent-275)와 US Military(ent-003) 모두 이란 공격 대상이며 국제 규탄에서 동일 진영 — 암시적 방위 동맹 강화

triples.subject: ent-305
